title: Alibaba Said Qwen3.8-Max Is Second Only to Fable 5. It Published No Benchmarks, So I Ran Mine.
author: ylnhari
description: Alibaba said Qwen3.8-Max is second only to Claude Fable 5, and published no benchmarks to show it. So I ran my own fifteen tasks across six models. The claim held up - and the models that lost, lost for a reason nobody advertises.
